name: Mexico
description: Mexico enters the 2026 FIFA World Cup as one of three host nations, carrying the hopes of a football-obsessed nation. With home advantage across three iconic venues — Estadio Azteca in Mexico City, Estadio Akron in Guadalajara, and Estadio BBVA in Monterrey — El Tri aims to finally break past the Round of 16, a barrier that has haunted them for decades. Under veteran coach Javier Aguirre, Mexico blends experienced campaigners with exciting young talent. Santiago Giménez leads the attack after stellar seasons in Europe, while Edson Álvarez anchors the midfield.

name: South Africa
description: South Africa return to the World Cup stage for the first time since hosting the tournament in 2010. Bafana Bafana qualified through a strong African campaign under Belgian coach Hugo Broos. Goalkeeper Ronwen Williams has been a standout performer, while Percy Tau provides creativity in attack.

name: South Korea
description: South Korea brings their trademark intensity and technical quality to the 2026 World Cup. Captain Son Heung-min remains the talisman, while Lee Kang-in and Kim Min-jae represent the next wave of Korean excellence in European football.

name: Czechia
description: Czechia returns to the World Cup with a blend of Premier League experience and Bundesliga firepower. Patrik Schick and Adam Hložek provide the goals, while Tomáš Souček's all-action midfield displays could be key.

name: Canada
description: Canada is a co-host of the 2026 FIFA World Cup and is looking to make a deep run in front of their home fans. Led by Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies and prolific striker Jonathan David, Les Rouges have the talent to surprise.

name: Bosnia and Herzegovina
description: Bosnia and Herzegovina return to the World Cup with experienced striker Edin Džeko still leading the line. The Dragons have developed a solid defensive structure and will be tough to beat.

name: Qatar
description: Qatar, the 2022 World Cup hosts and two-time Asian Cup champions, bring their experience to the 2026 tournament. Akram Afif, the 2024 Asian Player of the Year, leads an attack that thrives on quick passing and movement.

name: Switzerland
description: Switzerland are consistent World Cup performers, reaching the knockout stages in recent tournaments. Granit Xhaka orchestrates from midfield, while Manuel Akanji provides defensive solidity.

name: Brazil
description: Brazil, the most successful team in World Cup history with five titles, arrives in 2026 with a squad brimming with attacking talent. Vinícius Jr. is the Ballon d'Or holder, Rodrygo brings Champions League pedigree, and teenage sensation Endrick adds explosive energy. Under Dorival Júnior, the Seleção are hungry to add a sixth star to their jersey.

name: Morocco
description: Morocco stunned the world in 2022 by reaching the semi-finals, becoming the first African team to do so. The Atlas Lions return with the same winning mentality under Walid Regragui, with Achraf Hakimi leading a defense-first approach.

name: Haiti
description: Haiti makes a historic return to the World Cup for the first time since 1974. The Caribbean nation's qualification is a fairy-tale story, and Les Grenadiers will look to make their mark against heavyweight opposition.

name: Scotland
description: Scotland brings their passionate Tartan Army to the 2026 World Cup. With Premier League stars John McGinn, Scott McTominay, and Andrew Robertson, the Scots have the quality to compete in a tough group.

name: United States
description: The United States co-hosts the 2026 FIFA World Cup with enormous expectations. Under Mauricio Pochettino, the USMNT boasts a golden generation featuring Christian Pulisic, Weston McKennie, and Gio Reyna. With 11 of 16 venues on US soil, the home advantage is immense.

name: Paraguay
description: Paraguay returns to the World Cup after missing the 2022 edition. La Albirroja relies on Miguel Almirón's creativity and the emerging talent of Julio Enciso.

name: Australia
description: The Socceroos are a regular World Cup presence now, bringing their never-say-die attitude and physical style to the 2026 tournament. They'll aim to advance from the group stage for the second time.

name: Türkiye
description: Türkiye arrives with one of Europe's most exciting young talents in Arda Güler. Alongside Serie A maestro Hakan Çalhanoğlu and rising Juventus star Kenan Yıldız, the Crescent Stars have serious firepower.

name: Germany
description: Germany enters the 2026 World Cup with a revitalized squad under Julian Nagelsmann. Young stars Florian Wirtz and Jamal Musiala are among the most exciting talents in world football, and Die Mannschaft aims to restore their reputation after early exits in 2018 and 2022.

name: Curaçao
description: Curaçao makes their World Cup debut in 2026, a historic achievement for the small Caribbean island. Led by experienced Dutch coach Dick Advocaat, they'll look to enjoy every moment on the biggest stage.

name: Ivory Coast
description: Ivory Coast, the reigning African champions, bring flair and defensive strength to the World Cup. Under Emerse Faé, Les Éléphants have shown they can compete with the best.

name: Ecuador
description: Ecuador is one of South America's rising powers. Moisés Caicedo has become a Premier League star, while teenage prodigy Kendry Páez could be a breakout star of the tournament.

name: Netherlands
description: The Netherlands bring their Total Football philosophy to 2026. With Virgil van Dijk marshaling the defense and Cody Gakpo electrifying in attack, the Oranje are serious contenders.

name: Japan
description: Japan has emerged as a genuine force in world football, stunning Spain and Germany in 2022. With a squad packed with European-based stars like Takefusa Kubo and Kaoru Mitoma, the Samurai Blue can beat anyone.

name: Sweden
description: Sweden returns with a lethal attacking trio in Alexander Isak, Dejan Kulusevski, and Viktor Gyökeres. The Scandinavians have a proud World Cup history and the firepower to trouble anyone.

name: Tunisia
description: Tunisia are consistent African qualifiers, bringing defensive discipline and counter-attacking threat. The Eagles of Carthage proved they can compete in 2022 by beating France.

name: Belgium
description: Belgium's golden generation enters its final act at the 2026 World Cup. Kevin De Bruyne and Romelu Lukaku lead the charge, while Jérémy Doku represents the future. The Red Devils seek their first major trophy.

name: Egypt
description: Egypt's hopes rest heavily on the shoulders of Liverpool legend Mohamed Salah. The Pharaohs bring passionate support and the individual brilliance of one of the best players on the planet.

name: Iran
description: Iran is Asia's most consistent World Cup qualifier. With seasoned strikers Mehdi Taremi and Sardar Azmoun, Team Melli are always tough to beat and capable of upsets.

name: New Zealand
description: New Zealand's All Whites are back at the World Cup with Premier League striker Chris Wood leading the line. The Oceania champions will look to cause an upset.

name: Spain
description: Spain are the reigning European Champions and arrive as one of the favorites. Teenage sensation Lamine Yamal electrified Euro 2024 and continues to break records. With Pedri and Dani Olmo pulling the strings, La Roja play the most beautiful football on the planet.

name: Cape Verde
description: Cape Verde makes their World Cup debut in 2026, a remarkable achievement for this small island nation. The Blue Sharks will bring passion and fearlessness to the biggest stage.

name: Saudi Arabia
description: Saudi Arabia stunned the world in 2022 by beating Argentina in the group stage. The Green Falcons, now managed by Roberto Mancini, have the ambition and investment to repeat that magic.

name: Uruguay
description: Uruguay, two-time World Cup champions, bring South American grit under the tactical genius of Marcelo Bielsa. Darwin Núñez provides the goals, Federico Valverde controls the midfield, and Ronald Araújo anchors the defense.

name: France
description: France are 2018 World Cup winners and 2022 runners-up, making them one of the tournament's biggest threats. Kylian Mbappé is arguably the best player in the world. With the experience of Griezmann and the dynamism of Tchouaméni, Les Bleus are perennial favorites.

name: Senegal
description: Senegal are Africa's AFCON champions with quality across the pitch. While Sadio Mané's leadership is key, the Lions of Teranga have depth that makes them genuine dark horses.

name: Iraq
description: Iraq returns to the World Cup for the first time since 1986. The Lions of Mesopotamia qualified through a dramatic Asian campaign and carry the dreams of a football-mad nation.

name: Norway
description: Norway's World Cup hopes rest on the colossal shoulders of Erling Haaland, the most lethal striker in world football. With Arsenal captain Martin Ødegaard creating chances, Norway could be the tournament's breakout team.

name: Argentina
description: Argentina are the defending World Cup champions. Lionel Messi, now 39, may be playing in his final World Cup, adding emotional weight to every match. With Julián Álvarez and Enzo Fernández, La Albiceleste have both legacy and future secured.

name: Algeria
description: Algeria brings their AFCON-winning pedigree to the World Cup. The Desert Foxes combine technical flair with tactical discipline under Vladimir Petković.

name: Austria
description: Austria under Ralf Rangnick play an intense, pressing style that has troubled Europe's elite. If David Alaba is fit, he adds world-class quality. Marcel Sabitzer drives them forward from midfield.

name: Jordan
description: Jordan makes their historic World Cup debut in 2026 after reaching the Asian Cup final. The Chivalrous are one of the tournament's great underdog stories and will be cheered by neutrals worldwide.

name: Portugal
description: Portugal arrives with the eternal Cristiano Ronaldo, now 41, potentially making his final World Cup bow. Bruno Fernandes orchestrates from midfield, while Rafael Leão provides pace. The Seleção have a perfect blend of experience and youth.

name: DR Congo
description: DR Congo returns to the World Cup stage with a squad that combines African flair with European league experience. The Leopards have been one of Africa's most improved teams.

name: Uzbekistan
description: Uzbekistan makes their World Cup debut in 2026, a historic moment for Central Asian football. The White Wolves bring technical quality and immense national pride to the tournament.

name: Colombia
description: Colombia arrived at 2026 on a wave of momentum after reaching the 2024 Copa América final. Luis Díaz is electric on the wing, while James Rodríguez continues to deliver magic at World Cups.

name: England
description: England arrives under Thomas Tuchel with perhaps their most talented squad ever. Jude Bellingham is a Ballon d'Or contender, Bukayo Saka provides wide threat, and Phil Foden adds creativity. After consecutive Euro finals, the Three Lions hunger for World Cup glory.

name: Croatia
description: Croatia punches well above their weight at World Cups — finalists in 2018, third place in 2022. Luka Modrić, at 40, may be playing his final tournament. Joško Gvardiol is one of the world's best defenders.

name: Ghana
description: Ghana brings excitement and star power with Mohammed Kudus and Thomas Partey. The Black Stars have a proud World Cup history, reaching the quarter-finals in 2010.

name: Panama
description: Panama returns to the World Cup looking to improve on their debut in 2018. Los Canaleros bring fighting spirit and a never-give-up mentality that makes them dangerous underdogs.
